name: cut
description: Remove one or more sections from a video. Use --cuts for multiple cuts in one pass, --spec to write a trim spec instead of encoding.

output.description: Video with the specified section(s) removed, or trim spec JSON path when --spec is set

params.name: start
params.description: Start of section to remove (seconds). Use with --end for a single cut.

params.name: end
params.description: End of section to remove (seconds). Use with --start for a single cut.

params.name: cuts
params.description: JSON array of [start, end] pairs for multiple cuts in one pass, e.g. [[0,1],[5,6]]

params.name: spec
params.description: Write a trim spec JSON file instead of encoding. The path is printed to stdout.
